property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;c:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;c:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\pnpm in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\php;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2 in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm 2025.3.4 in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\TinyTeX in\windows;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1.1 in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\pnpm.pnpm_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\Lenovo\.dotnet	ools;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16 in;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Users\Lenovo\.local in;c:\Users\Lenovo\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Crear usuario exitosamente
testcase.classname: Autenticación de usuarios por API en Contact List App
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://thinking-tester-contact-list.herokuapp.com/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Pedro", "lastName": "Lopez", "password": "password123", "email": "pedro1_1782145503647@test.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Content-Length: 290 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Date: Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:25:06 GMT Etag: W/"122-5dPWxWOFa7HYO0AHa2sQKgF70+s" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=uQaNyk1GFIjLsBfzy7AymkmonwEdAwJbedM54pLNAC0%3D\u0026sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c\u0026ts=1782145506"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=uQaNyk1GFIjLsBfzy7AymkmonwEdAwJbedM54pLNAC0%3D&sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c&ts=1782145506" Server: Heroku Set-Cookie: token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlMjQ0MTM0OTAwMTVmZDIyMmQiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDZ9.X_-EIV29KKRB3MU7yULycGJqXeGgWdoH6BpGzIEHaMQ; Max-Age=684; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:36:30 GMT Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Powered-By: Express
{ "user": { "_id": "6a3961e24413490015fd222d", "firstName": "Pedro", "lastName": "Lopez", "email": "pedro1_1782145503647@test.com", "__v": 1 }, "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlMjQ0MTM0OTAwMTVmZDIyMmQiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDZ9.X_-EIV29KKRB3MU7yULycGJqXeGgWdoH6BpGzIEHaMQ" }

testcase.name: Login exitoso
testcase.classname: Autenticación de usuarios por API en Contact List App
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://thinking-tester-contact-list.herokuapp.com/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Laura", "lastName": "Gomez", "password": "password123", "email": "laura_api_ok1@test.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Content-Length: 283 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Date: Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:25:07 GMT Etag: W/"11b-GhV1Js6iwAZGD7O83fa/Ys72DdM" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Dvaj3EINU7jjVc%2Blds7wWG9Nl9mHceIEFg%2FxAak7i10%3D\u0026sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c\u0026ts=1782145507"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Dvaj3EINU7jjVc%2Blds7wWG9Nl9mHceIEFg%2FxAak7i10%3D&sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c&ts=1782145507" Server: Heroku Set-Cookie: token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlMzQ0MTM0OTAwMTVmZDIyMmYiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDd9.ZCp1W0Q8pQyufjoZF8xu4bjq-8I2Gpl9MD1a1pk6j2A; Max-Age=684; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:36:31 GMT Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Powered-By: Express

testcase.name: Obtener perfil del usuario autenticado
testcase.classname: Autenticación de usuarios por API en Contact List App
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://thinking-tester-contact-list.herokuapp.com/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Mario", "lastName": "Ruiz", "password": "password123", "email": "mario_api_me1@test.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Content-Length: 282 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Date: Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:25:08 GMT Etag: W/"11a-WSQ3B6nWRS16egZcyyFIG1i00As" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=hcg67rkJ4MfWrdfv2iyKTz3JTPuM45P0rHQbOXJEL88%3D\u0026sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c\u0026ts=1782145508"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=hcg67rkJ4MfWrdfv2iyKTz3JTPuM45P0rHQbOXJEL88%3D&sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c&ts=1782145508" Server: Heroku Set-Cookie: token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlNDQ0MTM0OTAwMTVmZDIyMzIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDh9.4QqnJEgawNdx4piG8S-7-FWLJORGguY-ur9BE0-EIeU; Max-Age=684; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:36:32 GMT Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Powered-By: Express
{ "user": { "_id": "6a3961e44413490015fd2232", "firstName": "Mario", "lastName": "Ruiz", "email": "mario_api_me1@test.com", "__v": 1 }, "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlNDQ0MTM0OTAwMTVmZDIyMzIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDh9.4QqnJEgawNdx4piG8S-7-FWLJORGguY-ur9BE0-EIeU" }

testcase.name: Login fallido con contraseña incorrecta
testcase.classname: Autenticación de usuarios por API en Contact List App
testcase.system-out:
Request method: POST Request URI: https://thinking-tester-contact-list.herokuapp.com/users Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "firstName": "Sofia", "lastName": "Diaz", "password": "password123", "email": "sofia_api_fail1@test.com" } HTTP/1.1 201 Created Content-Length: 284 Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Date: Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:25:10 GMT Etag: W/"11c-Ts7EqWbV1iyvUh5nh1LPD04La6I" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=YQ0fRRMLRD7p2Md1Nw4%2FZQoaADQx8%2FCv5G9MFA4ky2U%3D\u0026sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c\u0026ts=1782145509"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=YQ0fRRMLRD7p2Md1Nw4%2FZQoaADQx8%2FCv5G9MFA4ky2U%3D&sid=af571f24-03ee-46d1-9f90-ab9030c2c74c&ts=1782145509" Server: Heroku Set-Cookie: token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlNTQ0MjdjZTAwMTUyODM4YzIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDl9.YzGXp-sd7ltJj48dk_RiHfHD9zn97LcnLWggHYXkn4s; Max-Age=684; Path=/; Expires=Mon, 22 Jun 2026 16:36:34 GMT Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Powered-By: Express
{ "user": { "_id": "6a3961e54427ce00152838c2", "firstName": "Sofia", "lastName": "Diaz", "email": "sofia_api_fail1@test.com", "__v": 1 }, "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJfaWQiOiI2YTM5NjFlNTQ0MjdjZTAwMTUyODM4YzIiLCJpYXQiOjE3ODIxNDU1MDl9.YzGXp-sd7ltJj48dk_RiHfHD9zn97LcnLWggHYXkn4s" }
